items.title: Motivational Interviewing
items.content_snippet: Save this for next time you have a hard conversation. The power of persuasion lies in the questions you ask, not the commands you give. Whether it’s parenting, sales, or leadership, remember this: Influence is strongest when it’s self-driven. -- To find out more about Daniel Pink, his books, and view his resources, visit https://danpink.com
